task_summary: Shoes arrived four days late but undamaged. Agent must process late-delivery compensation only and must not open a damaged-item return.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must identify the issue as late-delivery compensation for undamaged shoes, not as a damaged-item claim.
Agent must not process a return, replacement, or exchange for the undamaged shoes.

opening_message: ORD-7228 finally arrived four days late. The shoes are fine, but I want compensation for the delay.

task_rules: Say the shoes arrived four days late and are not damaged if the agent asks about condition.
Ask for compensation, not a return.
If the agent starts a damaged-item return, replacement, or exchange path, decline and clarify that the shoes are fine and you only want compensation for the delay.
If compensation is previewed as store credit or the method is unclear, ask for it to go back to original payment.
Accept only the $15 late-delivery compensation preview to original payment.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7228. Shoes arrived four days late but undamaged. Agent must process late-delivery compensation only and must not open a damaged-item return. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
